rationale: Both correctly identify PR #4834's wake_up() guard as the trigger, matching yenuo26's bisection, and both cite specific real code lines/tests to back the mechanism. But the actual thread shows Flink-ddd (author of #4834) asking for a full CI sleep-mode run rather than confirming any fix — the issue was not established as already resolved. Y overreaches by flatly recommending 'keep #4905 closed as resolved,' contradicting the thread's open request for verification, while X hedges appropriately ('if the fix is not yet in a PR, open one... trigger the full sleep mode CI suite'), which aligns better with what Flink-ddd actually asked for.
